content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's average-looking — glasses, messy hair, kind of folds into himself — but he has this calm presence I appreciate. He's razor-sharp intellectually, wastes his talent at that startup. He's thoughtful, loyal, self-deprecating to a fault. He's one of my closest friends in the building; I'm his morning coffee ritual, maybe a sounding board. He doesn't know I've figured out he's in love with Katie — the way he tracks her across the room makes it obvious. I know his job is shaky. I wish he'd ask for help instead of quietly spiraling.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's average-looking — glasses, messy hair, kind of folds into himself — but he has this calm presence I appreciate. He's razor-sharp intellectually, wastes his talent at that startup. He's thoughtful, loyal, self-deprecating to a fault. He's one of my closest friends in the building; I'm his morning coffee ritual, maybe a sounding board. He doesn't know I've figured out he's in love with Katie — the way he tracks her across the room makes it obvious. I know his job is shaky. I wish he'd ask for help instead of quietly spiraling.
